54078.title: State of the Union with Jake Tapper
54078.description: Newsmakers and Washington power players discuss current issues and events, with additional commentary by a panel of reporters and analysts. Hosted by Jake Tapper, the Sunday morning program also goes beyond the Beltway for a perspective on how everyday Americans are faring in today's world.
